column9: Five stabilised after approx 0.70 s from first detected label; repeated dry-run forward commands followed.
Zero stabilised after approx 0.73 s from first detected label; dry-run stop commands followed.
First PointLeft attempt produced Zero/None labels and never generated PointLeft.
Retest still produced mostly None; one false stable Five caused a false forward command.
Thumb_up appeared once as an unstable instantaneous label but did not pass debounce, so no JUMP command was generated.
When hand/frame was absent, watchdog emitted QUEUE_STOP plus DRIVE,0,0; classify as safety pass, not gesture-recognition pass.
